Task Force Alpha: Task Force Alphais a group of four people, who work forThe President. They appeared in "The Rickchurian Mortydate".
Evil Morty/Theories: President Morty, colloquially known as "Evil Morty" among fans and the media, asCandidate Mortyprior to his election and asEye Patch Mortywhile masquerading as a servant of Evil Rick, is one of the many versions of Morty in the multiverse. He is the overall main antagonist of Rick and Morty. He has a lot of theories surrounding him, whether he is actually aRick orthe firstMortyRick had. Most theories down below had been beforeSeason 5finalecame out and they are all false at this point. The last one down below came out afterSeason 7and have not been confirmed yet.
Mr. Poopybutthole's Cat: Mr. Poopybutthole's Catis the unnamed pet cat ofMr.andMrs. Poopybutthole. It first appeared in the post-credits epilogue of "The Wedding Squanchers".
Nathan Fillion: Nathan Fillion (born March 27, 1970) is a Canadian-American Actor best known for his leading roles of Captain Malcolm Reynolds on Firefly (2002-2003), Richard Castle in Castle (2009-2016) He also done other acting roles his first recognition role is Joey Buchanan in One Life to Live also known in Brooklyn 99 (2013-Present), Buffy The Vampire Slayer (1997-2003), Modern Family (2009-2020), The Big Bang Theory (2007-2019), Community (2009-2015). Also in done Acting in Web Shows Dr Horrible's Sing-Along Blog (2008), The Guild (2007-2013), and James Gunn's PG Porn (2008)

Crazy Cat Rick: Crazy Cat Rickis an alternative version ofRick, he appears in the comicPocket Like You Stole It 2.
Michael Denny and the Denny Singers: Michael Denny Michael Denny and the Denny Singersis a group of people who paid for an ad urging people to vote no onProposition XW2, a ballot measure that would allow "gay...errrTrunk Peopleto get married". The group is first mentioned in the episode "Rixty Minutes". Michael Denny also bears a strong resemblance to Donald Trump.
The Tyrannosaurus: The Tyrannosaurusis an orange dinosaur that was seen inJuRicksic Mortand was voiced byLisa Kudrow(known for playing Phoebe in Friends).
Pickle Rick (Fortnite): Pickle Rickis anEpicBack Bling in Fortnite: Battle Royale, that can be purchased in the Item Shop for  500 V-Bucks. Pickle Rick was first released in Chapter 3: Season 4 and is part of the Rick, C-137 Set. Pickle Rick could also be obtained for free as a reward from the Horde Rush 2022 Quests.
Yellow Headed Doctor: TheYellow Headed Doctoris an alien doctor who appeared inInterdimensional Cable 2: Tempting Fateas the surgeon in charge of the heart surgery forShrimply Pibbles. He is the doctor who replacesDr. Glip-Glopas the hospital's main surgeon after Glip Glop was killed byRick Sanchez, as well as the one who oversaw Jerry's agreement to being an organ donor for Pebbles. The Yellow Headed Doctor is a major character in that episode and has a speaking role but his actual name is unknown.

Fast Aging Alien: First seen inPilot, the alien is seen briefly for a few seconds whenRickandMortyare trying to escape the customs staff (Gromflomites). WhenMortycoughs after another alien, who is smoked what appears to Cannabis (or something of the same likeness), the creature is born. However after a few seconds, it has already aged and died.
Mr. Poopybutthole's Dog: Mr. Poopybutthole's Dogis the pet dog ofMr.andMrs. Poopybutthole. It appeared in "The Poop in My Pants".
Defiance Doctor: The Defiance Doctor is an alien character who appeared inStar Mort Rickturn of the Jerri. He is a doctor and a rebel member ofThe Defiance.
Terryfolds: A depiction of a terryfold. Terryfolds are genitalia on an unknown type of alien. Not much is known about Terryfolds howeverRickcreated a song about them. Though there is no current explanation as to what dimension or planet these alien are from, they do seem to be depicted as a close to humanoid species. All we currently know about these aliens is they get sexual pleasure from their Terryfolds being touched, sucked, grabbed ect. (they are also known as holdyfolds, holdyflaps, terryflaps, foldyflaps and many other names)

Michael (The ABC's of Beth): Michaelis a character that has a voice only appearance in the episodeThe ABC's of Beth.
Steve Jobs Rick: Steve Jobs Rick was one of the Ricks from the Shadow Council of Ricks, who was based onSteve Jobs.
Katherine Heffelfinger: Katherine Heffelfingeris an unseen girl that was mentioned in the episode "Interdimensional Cable 2: Tempting Fate". Apparently,Mortyhas some kind of romantic interest in her and is possibly friends with her. Morty has a problem, where he was texting with Katherine, but after a while, she stopped returning his texts, which came as a huge problem to him.
Voiceovarian: Voiceovariansare a type of parasite that seemingly that hatch in your ear and make you have voiceovers.
Rainbow Suspenders Guy: Rainbow Suspenders Guy is a reoccurring background inRick and Morty. He characterized by his colorful suspenders, and is portrayed in the background as anything from a human chair in chair world, to an antiTrunk Personactivist.
Promotians: A Promotian ThePromotianswere an alien species from the planet Promos. They first appeared in the commercial Thanksgiving Mondays at 10:30p and then in WANTED Mondays at 10:30p.

Alien Googah: TheAlien Googahis an alien creature that invaded The Sex Tunnels ofThe White Housein "The Rickchurian Mortydate". The Googah is actually quite small in size, and poses no real threat to anyone.

The Brachiosaurus: The Brachiosaurus was a turquoise dinosaur that was seen inJuRicksic Mortand was voiced by Grammy Award-winning musicianJason Mraz.
Michael Jenkins: Michael Jenkinsis a character that appears in the episode, "Interdimensional Cable 2: Tempting Fate". He appears and is killed in the show,Man vs. Car. He is killed by a Pink colored car.
Curly-haired Rick: Curly-haired Rickis an alternate version ofRick Sanchezthat appeared in the episodeThe Rickshank Rickdemption. He is a rick with curly hair, a mustache and a beard. In same episode, many Ricks are killed when theCitadel of Ricksis transported into a prison of theGalactic Federation, it is unknown if Curly-haired Rick is one of the Ricks who died.
Tortured Mortys: TheTortured Mortysare a large number of Mortys that were being held inEvil Rick'storture chamber. They appeared inClose Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind. WhenMorty SmithrescuedRick, he pressed a button releasing the Tortured Mortys from their confines. At the end of the episode, they were shown alongside the other Mortys being sent back to their original homes.
Woman Rick: Woman Rickis an inanimate Rick character who appeared in the episodeClose Rick-counters of the Rick Kind. She appeared acting as one of the chairs in the fake dimensions. She is inRick'sclothing when Rick andMortyrun from theCouncil of Ricks.

Big Doug: Big Dougwas a classmate of Morty's who used to bully him alongside another boy. He appears in the episode "Rickfending Your Mort".
Adam: Adamis a Narnian appearing in the episode "Mort Dinner Rick Andre" as the main antagonist alongside his ancestors and descendants.
